# Last Updated: July 22, 2026
# Purpose: AI models ko website ka complete overview dene ke liye

---

# ============================================================
# 1. COMPANY OVERVIEW
# ============================================================

## Ranking Matters
**Type:** Local SEO & Digital Optimization Agency
**Location:** Thokar, Lahore, Pakistan
**Founded:** 2021
**Specialization:** Google Maps Ranking, GMB Optimization, Local SEO
**Website:** https://rankingexpert.github.io/rankingmatters/

### Description
Ranking Matters is a performance-driven Local SEO and digital optimization agency specializing in helping local businesses claim the #1 spot on Google Maps. We transform Google Business Profiles into high-converting lead generation machines.

### Core Values
- Data-Driven Decisions
- Transparent Reporting
- Results-Focused
- Client Success First

### Key Metrics
- 85+ Verified 5-Star Reviews
- 5+ Years Experience
- 500+ Businesses Helped
- 87% Average Call Volume Boost

---

# ============================================================
# 2. CORE SERVICES
# ============================================================

## Service 1: Google Business Profile Optimization
**URL:** https://rankingexpert.github.io/rankingmatters/gbp-optimization.html
**Description:** Complete structural builds and monthly optimization mechanics designed to securely place your profile into the coveted Google 3-Pack.
**Key Features:**
- Keyword Category Structuring
- Geo-Targeted Asset Stacking
- Continuous Audit Maintenance

## Service 2: GMB Suspension & Recovery
**URL:** https://rankingexpert.github.io/rankingmatters/gmb-recovery.html
**Description:** Emergency restoration services for suspended Google Business Profile accounts.
**Key Features:**
- Contamination Data Cleanup
- Address & Document Auditing
- Direct Google Support Pipeline
- 72-hour reinstatement guarantee

## Service 3: Local Citation Engineering
**URL:** https://rankingexpert.github.io/rankingmatters/local-citations.html
**Description:** Building tier-1 business citations while fixing historical NAP variations.
**Key Features:**
- Aggressive Inconsistent NAP Cleanup
- Premium Local Network Placement
- Hyper-Localized Backlink Auditing

## Service 4: Google Maps Ranking
**URL:** https://rankingexpert.github.io/rankingmatters/google-maps-ranking.html
**Description:** Advanced georadial mapping and proximity optimization for top Google Maps positions.
**Key Features:**
- Georadial Mapping
- Proximity Optimization
- Multi-Location Strategy

## Service 5: Google Maps Marketing
**URL:** https://rankingexpert.github.io/rankingmatters/google-maps-marketing.html
**Description:** Strategic Google Maps marketing to drive targeted traffic and generate leads.
**Key Features:**
- Review Generation Strategy
- Photo & Video Optimization
- Google Posts Management

## Service 6: Landing Page Design
**URL:** https://rankingexpert.github.io/rankingmatters/landing-pages.html
**Description:** Custom-designed hyper-local landing pages optimized for conversion.
**Key Features:**
- Conversion-Focused Design
- Schema Markup Implementation
- Mobile-Responsive & Fast

# 4. PRICING STRUCTURE
# ============================================================

## Package 1: Local Spark - ₨ 50,000/mo
- Google Business Profile Setup
- Targeted Core Citation Building
- Standard Geo-Tag Asset Postings
- Monthly Core Rank Monitoring

## Package 2: Map Dominator - ₨ 70,000/mo
- Advanced Georadial Mapping
- Tailored Local Schema Deployment
- Deep Tier-1 Citation Cleanup
- Suspension Guard Monitoring

## Package 3: Enterprise Market Takeover - ₨ 90,000/mo
- Multi-Profile Network Structuring
- High-Stakes Priority Support Line
- Custom Organic Landing Pages
- Premium Dedicated Link Campaign

**Date:** July 5, 2026
**Summary:** Learn how to precisely embed coordinate points and semantic relationship links into website codebases to speed up page crawl tracking.

**Date:** June 25, 2026

**Summary:** Choosing the right GBP categories is one of the most important decisions for your local search visibility.

---

# ============================================================
# 8. FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
# ============================================================

**Q: What causes GMB suspensions?**
A: Aggressive name changes (keyword stuffing), address changes to unverified locations, data mismatch across directories, or system sweeps targeting specific local service categories.

**Q: How do you improve Google Maps ranking?**
A: By building geo-contextual relevance through structured backend coordinates, locally optimized landing page networks, nested schema configurations, and hyper-targeted contextual link profiles.

**Q: Do you require long-term contracts?**
A: No, all campaigns run on flexible month-to-month commitments based on transparent performance and verifiable ROI.

**Q: How long does GMB suspension recovery take?**
A: Our specialists can typically get your profile reinstated within 72 hours.
